generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you know how important it is to have a strong national defense. But did you know that excessive reliance on foreign allies for our security needs is making us vulnerable? By investing in our own strategic autonomy, we can ensure our safety without compromising our civil liberties. It's time to take responsibility for our own defense and reduce the burden on our allies. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
